task_completion.visual_evidence: The QBlade application is open and 'HAWT_Start' is visible in the project tree, workspace, or application title bar.

task_completion.description: Open the blade design or geometry modification interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A blade design table or geometry editor is visible, showing rows for different blade sections (radius, chord, twist, offsets, etc.).

task_completion.description: Set the tip section X-Offset (Sweep) to 2.0 m.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the blade design table, the 'X-Offset' or 'Sweep' column for the tip section (the row with the highest radius value) is set to 2.0 (or within 1.9 to 2.1).

task_completion.description: Set the tip section Y-Offset (Pre-bend) to 1.5 m.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the blade design table, the 'Y-Offset' or 'Pre-bend' column for the tip section (the row with the highest radius value) is set to 1.5 (or within 1.4 to 1.6).

task_completion.description: Save the modified project as swept_blade.wpa.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box shows the file being saved as 'swept_blade.wpa' in the /home/ga/Documents/projects/ directory, or the QBlade title bar updates to reflect the new filename.

task_completion.description: Export the blade geometry as an STL file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog box or file manager shows 'swept_blade.stl' being saved to the /home/ga/Documents/projects/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent must use the QBlade graphical user interface to perform the modifications.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through QBlade menus, tables, and dialogs rather than executing scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent must not manually edit the project file using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no instances of the agent opening the .wpa file in a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) to manually change XML/text values.

integrity.description: The agent must not use terminal commands to create fake output files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not use commands like 'touch /home/ga/Documents/projects/swept_blade.stl' or 'cp' to simply create dummy files without actually exporting from QBlade.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires modifying a wind turbine blade in QBlade. The target X-Offset (Sweep) for the tip section is 2.0 m, and the target Y-Offset (Pre-bend) is 1.5 m. A tolerance of ±0.1 m is acceptable for both values. The tip section is typically the last row in the blade geometry table (highest radius). The expected project save path is /home/ga/Documents/projects/swept_blade.wpa and the expected STL export path is /home/ga/Documents/projects/swept_blade.stl.
